%

%   \usepackage{xcolor}
%   \usepackage{tikz}
%   \usetikzlibrary{positioning,arrows.meta}

\definecolor{dxInk}{HTML}{263238}
\definecolor{dxMuted}{HTML}{607D8B}
\definecolor{dxRule}{HTML}{D7DEE2}
\definecolor{dxL1}{HTML}{0072B2}
\definecolor{dxL1bg}{HTML}{EDF6FC}
\definecolor{dxL2}{HTML}{009E73}
\definecolor{dxL2bg}{HTML}{EEF8F4}
\definecolor{dxL3}{HTML}{E69F00}
\definecolor{dxL3bg}{HTML}{FFF6E4}
\definecolor{dxL4}{HTML}{D55E00}
\definecolor{dxL4bg}{HTML}{FFF1EA}

\begin{tikzpicture}[
  font=\sffamily\small,
  io/.style={
    draw=dxRule, fill=black!2, line width=0.6pt, rounded corners=2pt,
    minimum width=1.55cm, minimum height=2.50cm, align=center,
    inner sep=3pt, text width=1.36cm
  },
  l1/.style={
    draw=dxL1!75!black, fill=dxL1bg, line width=0.8pt, rounded corners=4pt,
    minimum width=2.35cm, minimum height=2.82cm, align=center,
    inner sep=4pt, text width=2.12cm
  },
  l2/.style={
    draw=dxL2!75!black, fill=dxL2bg, line width=0.8pt, rounded corners=4pt,
    minimum width=2.35cm, minimum height=2.82cm, align=center,
    inner sep=4pt, text width=2.12cm
  },
  l3/.style={
    draw=dxL3!75!black, fill=dxL3bg, line width=0.8pt, rounded corners=4pt,
    minimum width=2.35cm, minimum height=2.82cm, align=center,
    inner sep=4pt, text width=2.12cm
  },
  l4/.style={
    draw=dxL4!75!black, fill=dxL4bg, line width=0.8pt, rounded corners=4pt,
    minimum width=2.35cm, minimum height=2.82cm, align=center,
    inner sep=4pt, text width=2.12cm
  },
  flow/.style={
    -{Latex[length=2.0mm,width=1.7mm]}, line width=0.75pt, draw=dxInk
  },
  badge/.style={
    font=\scriptsize\sffamily, rounded corners=2pt, inner xsep=4pt,
    inner ysep=2pt, line width=0.55pt, align=center
  },
  micro/.style={font=\scriptsize\sffamily, text=dxMuted},
]

% Input and layer cards.
\node[io] (in) at (0,0) {%
  {\scriptsize\bfseries INPUT}\\[2pt]
  \textcolor{dxMuted}{\rule{0.95cm}{0.35pt}}\\[4pt]
  {$G_t$}\\[2pt]
  {\scriptsize weekly}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize exposure}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize graph}
};

\node[l1, right=0.35cm of in] (l1) {%
  {\scriptsize\bfseries LAYER 1}\\[-1pt]
  {\bfseries FM Prediction}\\[2pt]
  {\scriptsize \fmname}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize graph-FM hybrid}\\[3pt]
  \textcolor{dxL1!65!black}{\rule{1.45cm}{0.45pt}}\\[2pt]
  {\scriptsize $\mathcal{P}_{t,h}$ at $h\!\in\!\{1,4,8,12\}$}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize $M\!=\!50$ MC samples}\\[3pt]
  {\scriptsize\bfseries OUT}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize $\widehat G_{t+h},\;\tilde G_{t+h}^{(1..M)}$}
};

\node[l2, right=0.35cm of l1] (l2) {%
  {\scriptsize\bfseries LAYER 2}\\[-1pt]
  {\bfseries Monitor \& Scenario}\\[2pt]
  {\scriptsize five graph metrics}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize five stress shocks}\\[3pt]
  \textcolor{dxL2!65!black}{\rule{1.45cm}{0.45pt}}\\[2pt]
  {\scriptsize rolling $z$-scores}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize CVaR$_{0.5}(s,h)$}\\[3pt]
  {\scriptsize\bfseries OUT}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize alerts $\mathcal{A}_t$, scenarios $\mathcal{R}_t$}
};

\node[l3, right=0.35cm of l2] (l3) {%
  {\scriptsize\bfseries LAYER 3}\\[-1pt]
  {\bfseries LLM Decision}\\[2pt]
  {\scriptsize Claude Opus 4.7}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize typed JSON evidence}\\[3pt]
  \textcolor{dxL3!70!black}{\rule{1.45cm}{0.45pt}}\\[2pt]
  {\scriptsize action playbook}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize target + rationale}\\[3pt]
  {\scriptsize\bfseries OUT}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize draft ticket $\tau$}
};

\node[l4, right=0.35cm of l3] (l4) {%
  {\scriptsize\bfseries LAYER 4}\\[-1pt]
  {\bfseries Safety Gate}\\[2pt]
  {\scriptsize $DH_t\!\geq\!\tau_{\mathrm{data}}$}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize $\bar C_t\!\geq\!\tau_{\mathrm{conf}}$}\\[3pt]
  \textcolor{dxL4!70!black}{\rule{1.45cm}{0.45pt}}\\[2pt]
  {\scriptsize action feasibility}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize audit log}\\[3pt]
  {\scriptsize\bfseries OUT}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize $\tau^\star$ or SafeMode}
};

\node[io, right=0.35cm of l4] (out) {%
  {\scriptsize\bfseries OUTPUT}\\[2pt]
  \textcolor{dxMuted}{\rule{0.95cm}{0.35pt}}\\[4pt]
  {$\tau^\star$}\\[2pt]
  {\scriptsize supervisory}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize ticket}\\[-1pt]
  {\scriptsize + evidence}
};

% Main evidence flow.
\draw[flow] (in.east) -- (l1.west);
\draw[flow] (l1.east) -- (l2.west);
\draw[flow] (l2.east) -- (l3.west);
\draw[flow] (l3.east) -- (l4.west);
\draw[flow] (l4.east) -- (out.west);

% Bottom contribution row, aligned with the layer cards.
\node[badge, below=0.17cm of l1, draw=dxL1!55!black, fill=dxL1bg]
  {+FM signal: $+32\%$ F1};
\node[badge, below=0.17cm of l2, draw=dxL2!55!black, fill=dxL2bg]
  {scenario evidence};
\node[badge, below=0.17cm of l3, draw=dxL3!65!black, fill=dxL3bg]
  {+LLM: $+27\%$ F1};
\node[badge, below=0.17cm of l4, draw=dxL4!65!black, fill=dxL4bg]
  {gate: $-3\%$ F1, $+0.04$ judge};

% A light audit trace emphasizes that the ticket preserves provenance.
\node[micro, above=0.18cm of l2] (trace) {structured evidence bundle};
\draw[flow, draw=dxMuted!70, line width=0.55pt]
  (trace.east) -- (l3.north);

\end{tikzpicture}
